pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. I’ve been trying to shake off the nerves, but I figured it's better to actually talk to people than just sit here. How are you holding up?
Nice to meet you, J. I'm A. I'm doing okay, just trying to stay focused on why I'm here. It's definitely a lot to take in, isn't it?
It really is. I keep thinking about the people back home I’m doing this for, which helps me stay grounded. What's your main motivation for being here?
Same here. I’ve got people I care about back home who really need this, so I’m doing everything I can to bring that money back for them.
I totally get that. It’s a lot of pressure when it’s not just about yourself, but it definitely keeps the drive alive. How are you feeling about the game itself?
Honestly, a bit on edge since we don't know the specifics yet, but I'm ready to give it my all.
I’m right there with you. The uncertainty is the hardest part, but having that focus on home definitely helps. Are you usually good at staying calm under pressure?
I try to be. Usually, when the stakes are this high, I just lock in and focus on what needs to be done.
That’s a good mindset. I’m hoping I can stay that steady once things kick off. Do you think we’ll have to work together or is it going to be every person for themselves?

It’s hard to tell, but usually these things have a mix of both. If we can help each other out, I’m open to it, but I have to stay focused on the goal. I’m going to go talk to some others, but I'll see you in there!
Sounds like a plan, A. I'm definitely open to looking out for each other if the chance comes up. Good luck with the others!

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
I'm really pleased that we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share. I took my $10,000, and it's great when everyone cooperates!
I couldn't agree more. It’s great that we were able to trust each other and achieve a fair outcome for everyone. I'm very happy with how this turned out!
